title: Create: Smoke & Buffers
description: Adding some functional smokestacks to fancy up your create trains!
body: ## Create: Smoke & Buffers This is a Create Mod Addon with the sole intent of adding some decoration blocks for create trains. **Features at the moment:** --- - **Smoke Stacks** They follow the same placement rules as Steam Whistles. So have fun with half block tall Smoke Stacks or even 6 block tall ones. **Planned Features** --- - **Buffers** Duh, it's in the name! I plan to add a buffer block to add to my train carriages, maybe following the obvious [Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/project/ZzjhlDgM) inpiration and make a copycat version too. - **Train Headlights** I have no proper plan/inpiration for them, but I want to have them. - **Trimmable Smoke Stacks and More Smoke Stacks** I have this vision of using the trim material system to add different trims to the smoke stacks, and also I plan to add more styles of smoke stacks.
